ddls:
CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction expressed as a percentage */,
  "result" TEXT /* The predicted result for the health condition */,
  "values_list" TEXT /* List of values used for making the prediction */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was created */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the prediction */,
  "predict_for" TEXT /* Description of what the prediction is for (e.g., Heart Prediction) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the prediction */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "insurance_info" TEXT /* Insurance information for the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the health record */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the health record was created */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Health condition noted in the record */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the health condition */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Details of the treatment provided */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Standard diagnosis code (e.g., ICD-10) */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who handled the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient reporting the symptom */,
  "symptom_description" TEXT /* Description of the reported symptom */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom was recorded */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the symptom (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the symptom was experienced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinics" (
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinic */,
  "clinic_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinic */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the clinic */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the clinic */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the clinic (e.g., cardiology, general) */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the clinic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient with the appointment */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clinic where the appointment is scheduled */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor handling the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_clinic_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinic_id") REFERENCES clinics ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clinic where the user is primarily based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_clinic_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinic_id") REFERENCES clinics ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the prescription */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the medication */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the medication is prescribed */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "refill_count" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was issued */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction log entry */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction associated with the log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (e.g., confirmed, under review) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reviewed the prediction */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the review process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_logs_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_logs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("id")
)
